agent_cli_controls: run-stage defaults to dry-run work-order creation
run-stage work orders include thread_id and checkpoint_id
tracker is read-only unless --write is supplied
execute is fail-closed when only the contract adapter exists

commands.contract: Show one-screen runtime state and latest receipt/handoff.
commands.name: status

commands.contract: Run bounded boot smoke and surface boot verdict/receipt.
commands.name: boot

commands.contract: Verify critical operator-surface, runner-contract, tracker-preview, and boot artifacts.
commands.name: verify

commands.contract: Run non-destructive diagnostic checks with JSON evidence and remediations.
commands.name: doctor

commands.contract: Render compact tracker preview from runtime/state/TRACKER_STATE_v1.json.
commands.name: tracker

commands.contract: Prepare a checkpointed bounded governed stage work order; execute only through stage_runner_v1 contract adapter and future real executor.
commands.name: run-stage

commands.contract: Dry-run latest handoff continuation without executing new work.
commands.name: replay

commands.contract: Create a compressed complete OS ZIP plus checksum sidecar.
commands.name: export

purpose: Add checkpointed stage-runner contract and tracker preview to the compact operator surface.
research_bindings: LangGraph checkpoint/thread_id persistence and interrupt resume pattern
OpenTelemetry trace/span vocabulary for later trace ledger alignment
